heading: Omitted
label: 593 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized exchanges of allotted, restricted, and tribal lands for Chippewa National Forest lands, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act June 8, 1940, ch. 285, § 354 Stat. 255
